metadata.description: Location for all resources. Defaults to the resource group location.

Tags to apply to all resources

catalogDbConnectionString.value: [format('{0};Database=CatalogDB', format('Host={0};Username={1};Password={2};SSL Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', format('{0}-postgres', parameters('namePrefix'))), '2025-08-01').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('administratorLogin'), parameters('administratorLoginPassword')))]
